title: Xanthous Fluffy Turkish Fig Bowl
description: A citrusy and energizing Turkish dish featuring figs and candy, served in an earthenware bowl, low in glycemic index for a healthy treat.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the chopped dried figs and diced candied orange peel.
In a large earthenware bowl, combine the plain Greek yogurt, honey, lemon zest, and vanilla extract, stirring until well combined.
Fold in the fig and orange peel mixture into the yogurt mixture until fluffy and smooth.
Top the mixture with chopped pistachios and coconut flakes.
Refrigerate the bowl for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with additional lemon zest if desired.
Serve the Xanthous Fluffy Turkish Fig Bowl chilled, straight from the earthenware bowl.
